key.name: enabled
key.description: Whether event alerts are currently enabled.

key.name: panel-position
key.description: Which GNOME Shell panel box should contain the MeetingTime indicator.

key.name: alert-minutes-before
key.description: How many minutes before an event starts the overlay should appear.

key.name: default-snooze-minutes
key.description: Default number of minutes to snooze an alert.

key.name: exclude-all-day-events
key.description: Whether all-day events should be ignored when scheduling alerts.

key.name: alert-horizon-hours
key.description: How far ahead to query events when refreshing.

key.name: refresh-interval-minutes
key.description: How frequently to refresh calendar data.

key.name: force-refresh-request
key.description: Internal token used to request an immediate calendar refresh from the preferences window.

key.name: no-events-label
key.description: Label shown by the indicator when there are no upcoming events.

key.name: enabled-calendar-uids
key.description: List of calendar source UIDs that may trigger alerts. An empty list means all calendars are disabled.

key.name: alert-sound-file
key.description: Filename of the bundled sound file used for alert playback. Empty means no sound.
